calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Gary Feliciano. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Francisco Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
John Lilly, Director of Hotel for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Guillermo Ortiz.

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 08, 2018.
Defendant's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 12, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on April 10, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, April 30, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation, and against defendant Guillermo Ortiz, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $48.18.
Costs - $335.00.
Total - $383.18

Additionally, plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation, is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 380 Eddy Street, #425, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Suzanne Ramos Bolanos, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present, represented by John Lilly.
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendant Guillermo Ortiz is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of April 30, 2018 remains on calendar.
